items.title: Well, half of this is in place. From what I understand, Gansey had a big part in the draft process and running the G League affiliate for Cleveland. The Sixers need to continue their strong recent draft record and improve on the margins.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Well, half of this is in place. From what I understand, Gansey had a big part in the draft process and running the G League affiliate for Cleveland. The Sixers need to continue their strong recent draft record and improve on the margins.

items.title: First batch of Celtics 2026 NBA Draft scouting.
items.author: Jack Simone
items.body_excerpt:
First batch of Celtics 2026 NBA Draft scouting.

I've been watching two full games of every prospect and sharing my thoughts. The first three:

UConn's Tarris Reed Jr.
North Carolina's Henri Veesaar
Houston's Chris Cenac

Full scouting reports here: www.bostonsportsjournal.com/2026/05/29/s...

media.title: Simone's Scouting Corner: Tarris Reed Jr., Henri Veesaar, and Chris Cenac
media.description: It's that time of year. The 2026 NBA Draft is less than one month away, and as things currently stand, the Boston Celtics have the No. 27 and No. 40 picks.
